subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! 'Abdu'l-Bahá hath summoned thee with the love of the Almighty Lord, and desireth for thee nearness at the court of the Most Glorious Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله عبدالبهاء ترا بمحبت حضرت کبریا خواند و مقربی درگاه جمال ابهی خواهد
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
